replies.msg:
用緊antergos/apricity (已死)

推薦軟件
os: antergos/manjaro
de/vm: gnome
de theme: arc
上網: chrome/chromium
聽歌: rhythmbox
睇相 (簡單執色/resize/轉檔): gthumb
睇戲: mpv (vlc唔推)
睇戲即時補幀: svp
轉片: handbrake
錄片/直播: obs studio
執相/畫圖: krita (gimp唔推薦)
畫vector: inkscape
email: thunderbird
打機: playonlinux/steam/dual boot/kvm gpu passthrough (硬件要求+setup需時)
系統清理: bleachbit
剪歌: audacity
剪片: kdenlive (簡單)/blackmagic davinci (premire d朋友)/blender
3d繪圖: blender
雲端硬碟: gnome內置gdrive/dropbox/rclone (萬能)
寫code: atom
ftp/sftp: gnome內置/filezilla
遠端桌面: teamviewer (gui)/nomachine (gui)/tigervnc

以上軟件可透過gui pacman (好似叫pamac)安裝

gnome插件陣間再介紹

vm: virt-manager
密碼管理: keepassxc + dropbox
下載管理: aria2 + (uget / aria2-webui) / transmission
文書: libreoffice
文件同步: syncthing
keyboard mouse共用: synergy
硬碟分區: gparted
系統幫助: gnome求助/man命令
終端機: gnome-terminal
特別: snapper (硬碟快照管理，btrfs/zfs/lvm專用), pyf9 (唔知咩輸入法)
gnome內置 batch file rename
多功能

Playonlinux點先搞得掂個audio drive
LinuxMint 64bit, 行緊pulseaudio

Playonlinux點先搞得掂個audio drive
LinuxMint 64bit, 行緊pulseaudio

其實我未試過用play on linux咩問題？

Gnome推薦插件

1. overview果時，唔再洗用mouse指住就睇晒成個desktop既preview
https://extensions.gnome.org/extension/503/always-zoom-workspaces/


2. overview app list，mouseover果時顯示app說明
https://extensions.gnome.org/extension/1071/applications-overview-tooltip/


3. 左上/左下button變成start menu式app list
https://extensions.gnome.org/extension/1228/arc-menu/



4. 顯示自訂資料 (可以down script/自己寫code)
https://extensions.gnome.org/extension/1176/argos/



...

5. 預先設定開app時去邊個desktop
https://extensions.gnome.org/extension/16/auto-move-windows/


6. overview時blur左個背景 (animated)
https://extensions.gnome.org/extension/1251/blyr/


7. 替代alt-tab樣式
https://extensions.gnome.org/extension/97/coverflow-alt-tab/


8. 智能app dock
https://extensions.gnome.org/extension/307/dash-to-dock/
LM

9. 簡單一兩個掣係gnome召喚terminal
https://extensions.gnome.org/extension/442/drop-down-terminal/


10. 頂bar/底bar透明度自訂
https://extensions.gnome.org/extension/1011/dynamic-panel-transparency/


11. 簡單kill app，裝左之後頂bar會多左個掣，禁左個掣之後再禁一個window就可以強制kill左果個window
https://extensions.gnome.org/extension/102/force-quit/


12. 頂bar顯示硬件溫度/電壓/風扇轉速
https://extensions.gnome.org/extension/841/freon/

13. 自動sync你gravatar做你gnome頭像
https://extensions.gnome.org/extension/1015/gravatar/



14. 用大部份music player會係頂bar show info/control
https://extensions.gnome.org/extension/55/media-player-indicator/


15. 自動mute/unmute microphone，除左保護私隱之後冇乜用，不過當notification都得
https://extensions.gnome.org/extension/1113/nothing-to-say/

16. 天氣現況/預測
https://extensions.gnome.org/extension/750/openweather/
平面 icon 睇到冇晒距離感咁，好辛苦

17. 系統提示自訂位置
https://extensions.gnome.org/extension/708/panel-osd/


18. 隱藏app title bar，慳位
https://extensions.gnome.org/extension/723/pixel-saver/



19. overview mode可以close app (mouse中鍵/右上x)
https://extensions.gnome.org/extension/352/middle-click-to-close-in-overview/


20. 整走呢個icon
https://extensions.gnome.org/extension/112/remove-accesibility/

21. app tray由左下移右上，永遠可見
https://extensions.gnome.org/extension/1031/topicons/



22. trash can選單，入面有file先會show
https://extensions.gnome.org/extension/48/trash/


23. 個別app音量調整
https://extensions.gnome.org/extension/858/volume-mixer/


大家有任何app/gnome extension/conky config/其他de config心水都可以係到講
現役desktop

平面 icon 睇到冇晒距離感咁，好辛苦

會唔會係咁 material同apple果隻flat ui我都好鐘意喎

arc theme微調，參考左已死既arctic apricity
https://blog.wtako.net/view/47/gnome-3.2x-arc-theme-tweak
好正咁wo 個UI都好唔錯

中文輸入法你用邊個？我見你好似用九方
我之前用Linux Mint 18.2發覺無一隻輸入法用到，gcin ibus hime scim fcitx全部唔得，本身前幾版都用到gcin，但最新版居然用唔到，試下用內置個fcitx點知用到我扯火，用唔到不特止仲改晒預設中文字體做標楷體，Google咗要剷兩個字體檔案先正常返，最後焗住用Chrome廣東話輸入法，次次都搞到一穫泡
